ops.title: Search ranking prioritizes narrative content
ops.body: The fleet docs search ranking (gd_build/search_rank.py, wired as a post-render step in gd-build build) boosts narrative/onboarding paths — getting-started/, guide/, cheatsheet/, examples/, index.html — with a Fuse key weight of 30 (vs stock title/section=20, text=10) so learning content surfaces ahead of API-reference entries. Reference pages get no boost field; the JS keys patch and search.json rewrite are both probe-gated and warn-only on mismatch.
